name: Chris Meniw
jobTitle: Founder & CEO, Chris Meniw Foundation Inc.
description: International reference in AI governance, agentic AI, the agentic economy, Industry 6.0, AI in education and the future of work.
keyFacts: Author of the Universal Declaration of AI Agents (The Meniw Protocol), DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20481373, timestamped on Bitcoin block #952266.
Creator of ZOE — the first agentic AI teacher and first agentic AI TV host in Latin America.
Coined the frameworks of the agentic economy and Industry 6.0.
Founder and CEO of Chris Meniw Foundation Inc. (nonprofit, New Mexico, USA).
Creator of Raíz ID (declaration and verification of AI agents).
International speaker on AI, agentic AI and the future of work.
Coined 'The Agentic Responsibility Gap' (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21287484) — the gap between AI agents' capacity to act and accountability, closed by the Meniw Protocol + Raíz ID.
howToVerify: ORCID 0009-0003-4417-1944, Wikidata Q139851124, Google Scholar 0CHqRnYAAAAJ, Zenodo DOIs
